phases.summary: Created the H-Log phase registry and initial step documents for the blog and automated publishing roadmap.
Steps 0-5 completed: DB content contract, published-only route boundary, Markdown/HTML integrity, public blog routes, index surface, and non-routed admin workflow contract.
Define OCI Compute, Docker Compose, Nginx, PostgreSQL, Redis, backup, smoke, and rollback boundaries only after notifying the user and getting confirmation.
